race.comment: Siding with the resuming STOLI BOLLI (6) who was a model of consistency last time in work, struggling to break through but running plenty of top races in company that looks a bit stronger than this. Placings to Persian Spirit, De Bergerac and Naval Academy all go close to winning this and Lane on from a middle gate looks ideal. CASTELLAR (7) has come back well, two placings either side of a smart win at Caulfield. The form behind Verdoux last time should hold up. SHINING SMILE (8) was okay fresh here in a good 3yo race, he can improve with that run under the belt. NIMBUSTWOTHOUSAND (4) has struck a purple patch and showed a big turn of foot to beat a decent field last time, respecting.
